name: Airtable
description: Airtable source connector — syncs bases, tables, records, comments, attachments.

fields.name: access_token
fields.title: Access Token
fields.description: The access token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: The refresh token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.

name: Apollo
description:
Apollo source connector.

Syncs Contacts, Accounts, Sequences, and Email Activities from your
team's Apollo account. Requires an Apollo API key (master key for
Sequences and Email Activities).

fields.name: api_key
fields.title: API Key
fields.description: The API key for Apollo. Create in Apollo: Settings > API.

name: Asana
description: Asana source connector — syncs workspaces, projects, tasks, sections, comments, files.

name: Attio
description: Attio source connector — syncs objects, lists, records, and notes.

fields.name: api_key
fields.title: API Key
fields.description: The API key for Attio. Generate one in Workspace Settings > Developers.

name: Bitbucket
description:
Bitbucket source connector integrates with the Bitbucket REST API to extract data.

Connects to your Bitbucket workspaces and repositories.

It supports syncing workspaces, repositories, directories,
and code files with configurable filtering options for branches and file types.

fields.name: access_token
fields.title: API Token
fields.description:
Create a Bitbucket API token [here](https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens) with scopes:
- account
- read:user:bitbucket
- read:workspace:bitbucket
- read:repository:bitbucket

When using this, also provide your Atlassian email address.

fields.name: email
fields.title: Email
fields.description: Your Atlassian email address (required for API token auth, not needed for OAuth)

fields.name: workspace
fields.title: Workspace
fields.description: Bitbucket workspace slug (e.g., 'my-workspace'). Can also be set in source config.

fields.name: repo_slug
fields.title: Repository Slug
fields.description: Specific repository to sync (e.g., 'my-repo'). If empty, syncs all repositories in the workspace.

fields.name: workspace
fields.title: Workspace
fields.description: Bitbucket workspace slug (e.g., 'my-workspace'). Required when using OAuth; for API-token auth this can also be set in credentials.

fields.name: repo_slug
fields.title: Repository Slug
fields.description: Specific repository to sync (e.g., 'my-repo'). If empty, syncs all repositories in the workspace.

fields.name: branch
fields.title: Branch name
fields.description: Specific branch to sync (e.g., 'main', 'develop'). If empty, uses the default branch.

fields.name: file_extensions
fields.title: File Extensions
fields.description: List of file extensions to include (e.g., '.py', '.js', '.md'). If empty, includes all text files.

name: Box
description:
Box source connector integrates with the Box API to extract and synchronize data.

Connects to your Box account and syncs folders, files, comments, users, and collaborations.

fields.name: access_token
fields.title: Access Token
fields.description: The access token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: The refresh token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.

fields.name: folder_id
fields.title: Folder ID
fields.description: Specific Box folder ID to sync. Default is '0' (root folder, syncs all files). To sync a specific folder, enter its folder ID. You can find folder IDs in the Box URL when viewing a folder.

name: Cal.com
description:
Cal.com source connector.

Syncs bookings from the Cal.com API into searchable entities.

The connector:
- Uses the Bookings API with `cal-api-version=2024-08-13`
- Paginates with `take`/`skip`
- Supports incremental sync via `afterUpdatedAt` cursor watermark

fields.name: api_key
fields.title: API Key
fields.description: Cal.com API key. Generate it from your Cal.com Settings → Security page. Test keys start with 'cal_' and live keys with 'cal_live_'.

fields.name: host
fields.title: Host
fields.description: Base URL for your Cal.com instance. Use the default for cal.com cloud (https://api.cal.com). For self-hosted instances, set this to your API host (e.g. https://cal.example.com or https://cal.example.com/api if exposed there).

name: ClickUp
description:
ClickUp source connector integrates with the ClickUp API to extract and synchronize data.

Connects to your ClickUp workspaces.

It supports syncing workspaces, spaces, folders, lists, tasks, and comments.

fields.name: access_token
fields.title: Access Token
fields.description: The access token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.

name: Coda
description:
Coda source connector.

Syncs docs, pages (with content), and tables/rows from Coda.
Auth: Personal API Token or OAuth (via Packs).

fields.name: api_key
fields.title: Personal API Token
fields.description: Coda Personal API Token from Account settings

fields.name: doc_id
fields.title: Doc ID
fields.description: Sync only this doc (leave empty to sync all docs the token can access).

fields.name: folder_id
fields.title: Folder ID
fields.description: Limit docs to this folder (optional).

name: Confluence
description:
Confluence source connector integrates with the Confluence REST API to extract content.

Connects to your Confluence instance.

It supports syncing spaces, pages, blog posts, comments, labels, and other
content types. It converts Confluence pages to HTML format for content extraction and
extracts embedded files and attachments from page content.

name: CTTI AACT
description:
CTTI source connector integrates with the AACT PostgreSQL database to extract trials.

Connects to the Aggregate Analysis of ClinicalTrials.gov database.
Creates web entities that link to ClinicalTrials.gov pages.

fields.name: username
fields.title: Username
fields.description: Username for the AACT Clinical Trials database

fields.name: password
fields.title: Password
fields.description: Password for the AACT Clinical Trials database

fields.name: limit
fields.title: Study Limit
fields.description: Maximum number of clinical trial studies to fetch from AACT database

fields.name: skip
fields.title: Skip Studies
fields.description: Number of clinical trial studies to skip (for pagination). Use with limit to fetch different batches.

name: Document360
description:
Document360 source connector.

Syncs project versions, categories, and articles from Document360
knowledge bases. Uses API token authentication.

fields.name: api_token
fields.title: API Token
fields.description: Document360 API token. Generate from Settings > Knowledge base portal > API tokens.

fields.name: base_url
fields.title: API Base URL
fields.description: Document360 API base URL (e.g. https://apihub.document360.io or https://apihub.us.document360.io for US). Leave empty to use default.

fields.name: lang_code
fields.title: Language Code
fields.description: Language code for article content (e.g. 'en', 'es'). Default: en.

name: Dropbox
description:
Dropbox source connector integrates with the Dropbox API to extract and synchronize files.

Connects to folder structures from your Dropbox account.

It supports downloading and processing files.

fields.name: exclude_path
fields.title: Exclude Path
fields.description: Path prefix to exclude from sync (e.g., '/archive'). If empty, nothing is excluded.

name: Fireflies
description:
Fireflies source connector.

Syncs meeting transcripts from Fireflies.ai. Uses the GraphQL API with
Bearer token (API key) authentication.

fields.name: api_key
fields.title: API Key
fields.description: The API key for the API

name: Freshdesk
description:
Freshdesk source connector.

Syncs tickets, conversations, contacts, companies, and solution articles from Freshdesk.

fields.name: api_key
fields.title: API Key
fields.description: Your Freshdesk API key. Find it in Profile Settings in your Freshdesk portal.

fields.name: domain
fields.title: Freshdesk Domain
fields.description: Your Freshdesk domain only (e.g., 'mycompany' for mycompany.freshdesk.com)

name: GitHub
description:
GitHub source connector integrates with the GitHub REST API to extract and synchronize data.

Connects to your GitHub repositories.

It supports syncing repository metadata, directory structures, and code files with
configurable filtering options for branches and file types.

fields.name: personal_access_token
fields.title: Personal Access Token
fields.description: GitHub PAT with read rights (code, contents, metadata) to the repository

fields.name: repo_name
fields.title: Repository Name
fields.description: Repository to sync in owner/repo format (e.g., 'airweave-ai/airweave')

fields.name: branch
fields.title: Branch name
fields.description: Specific branch to sync (e.g., 'main', 'development'). If empty, uses the default branch.

fields.name: sync_pull_requests
fields.title: Sync Pull Requests
fields.description: Sync merged pull requests and their review comments. Enables searching over PR descriptions, discussions, and code review feedback.

name: GitLab
description:
GitLab source connector integrates with the GitLab REST API to extract data.

Connects to your GitLab projects.

It supports syncing projects, users, repository files, issues, and merge requests
with configurable filtering options for branches and file types.

fields.name: access_token
fields.title: Access Token
fields.description: The access token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: The refresh token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.

fields.name: project_id
fields.title: Project ID
fields.description: Specific project ID to sync (e.g., '12345'). If empty, syncs all accessible projects.

fields.name: branch
fields.title: Branch name
fields.description: Specific branch to sync (e.g., 'main', 'master'). If empty, uses the default branch.

name: Gmail
description:
Gmail source connector integrates with the Gmail API to extract and synchronize email data.

Connects to your Gmail account.

It supports syncing email threads, individual messages, and file attachments.

fields.name: after_date
fields.title: After Date
fields.description: Sync emails after this date (format: YYYY/MM/DD or YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.name: included_labels
fields.title: Included Labels
fields.description: Labels to include (e.g., 'inbox', 'sent', 'important'). Defaults to inbox and sent.

fields.name: excluded_labels
fields.title: Excluded Labels
fields.description: Labels to exclude (e.g., 'spam', 'trash', 'promotions', 'social'). Defaults to spam and trash.

fields.name: excluded_categories
fields.title: Excluded Categories
fields.description: Gmail categories to exclude (e.g., 'promotions', 'social', 'updates', 'forums').

fields.name: gmail_query
fields.title: Custom Gmail Query
fields.description: Advanced. Custom Gmail query string (overrides all other filters if provided).

name: Google Calendar
description:
Google Calendar source connector integrates with the Google Calendar API to extract data.

Synchronizes calendars, events, and free/busy information.

It provides comprehensive access to your
Google Calendar scheduling information for productivity and time management insights.

name: Google Docs
description:
Google Docs source connector integrates with Google Drive API to extract Google Docs.

Connects to your Google Drive account to retrieve Google Docs documents.
Documents are exported as DOCX and processed through Airweave's file
processing pipeline to enable full-text semantic search across document content.

The connector handles:
- Document listing and filtering
- Content export and download (DOCX format)
- Metadata preservation (ownership, sharing, timestamps)
- Incremental sync via Drive Changes API

fields.name: include_trashed
fields.title: Include Trashed Documents
fields.description: Include documents that have been moved to trash. Defaults to False.

fields.name: include_shared
fields.title: Include Shared Documents
fields.description: Include documents shared with you by others. Defaults to True.

name: Google Drive
description:
Google Drive source connector integrates with the Google Drive API to extract files.

Supports both personal Google Drive (My Drive) and shared drives.

It supports downloading and processing files
while maintaining proper organization and access permissions.

fields.name: include_patterns
fields.title: Include Patterns
fields.description: List of file/folder paths to include in synchronization. Examples: 'my_folder/*', 'my_folder/my_file.pdf'. Separate multiple patterns with commas. If empty, all files are included.

name: Google Slides
description:
Google Slides source connector integrates with Google Drive API.

Connects to your Google Drive account to retrieve Google Slides presentations.
Presentations are exported as PDF and processed through Airweave's file
processing pipeline to enable full-text semantic search across presentation content.

Mirrors the Google Drive connector approach - treats Google Slides presentations as
regular files that get processed through the standard file processing pipeline.

The connector handles:
- Presentation listing and filtering via Google Drive API
- Content export and download (PDF format)
- Metadata preservation (ownership, sharing, timestamps)
- Incremental sync via Drive Changes API

fields.name: include_trashed
fields.title: Include Trashed Presentations
fields.description: Include presentations that have been moved to trash. Defaults to False.

fields.name: include_shared
fields.title: Include Shared Presentations
fields.description: Include presentations shared with you by others. Defaults to True.

name: HubSpot
description:
HubSpot source connector integrates with the HubSpot CRM API to extract CRM data.

Synchronizes customer relationship management data.

It provides comprehensive access to contacts, companies, deals, and support tickets.

fields.name: after_date
fields.title: After Date
fields.description: Only sync records created or modified after this date in UTC (format: YYYY-MM-DD). Useful for large CRM instances where you only need recent data.

name: Intercom
description:
Intercom source connector.

Syncs conversations, conversation messages (parts), and tickets from Intercom
to enhance support and CX queries.

fields.name: exclude_closed_conversations
fields.title: Exclude Closed Conversations
fields.description: Skip closed conversations during sync (recommended for faster syncing)

name: Jira
description:
Jira source connector integrates with the Jira REST API to extract project management data.

Connects to your Jira Cloud instance. Optionally integrates with Zephyr Scale
for test management entities (test cases, test cycles, test plans) when a
Zephyr Scale API token is provided.

It provides comprehensive access to projects, issues, and their
relationships for agile development and issue tracking workflows.

fields.name: access_token
fields.title: Access Token
fields.description: The access token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: The refresh token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.

fields.name: project_keys
fields.title: Project Keys
fields.description: List of Jira project keys to sync (e.g., 'PROJ', 'DEV', 'MARKET'). Only the specified projects will be synced. Hit enter to add new project.  You can find project keys in your Jira project settings.

name: Linear
description: Linear source connector — syncs teams, projects, users, issues, comments, attachments.

name: Monday
description:
Monday source connector integrates with the Monday.com GraphQL API to extract work data.

Connects to your Monday.com workspace.

It provides comprehensive access to boards, items, and team
collaboration features with full relationship mapping and custom field support.

name: Notion
description:
Notion source connector integrates with the Notion API to extract and synchronize content.

Connects to your Notion workspace.

It provides comprehensive access to databases, pages, and content with advanced content
aggregation, lazy loading, and file processing capabilities for optimal performance.

name: OneDrive
description:
OneDrive source connector integrates with the Microsoft Graph API to extract files.

Supports OneDrive personal and business accounts.

It supports various OneDrive scenarios including
personal drives, business drives, and app folder access with intelligent fallback handling.

name: OneNote
description:
Microsoft OneNote source connector integrates with the Microsoft Graph API.

Synchronizes data from Microsoft OneNote including notebooks, sections, and pages.

It provides comprehensive access to OneNote resources with proper token refresh
and rate limiting.

name: Outlook Calendar
description:
Outlook Calendar source connector integrates with the Microsoft Graph API to extract data.

Synchronizes data from Outlook calendars.

It provides comprehensive access to calendars, events, and attachments
with proper timezone handling and meeting management features.

name: Outlook Mail
description:
Outlook Mail source connector integrates with the Microsoft Graph API to extract email data.

Synchronizes data from Outlook mailboxes.

It provides comprehensive access to mail folders, messages, and
attachments with hierarchical folder organization and content processing capabilities.

fields.name: after_date
fields.title: After Date
fields.description: Sync emails after this date (format: YYYY/MM/DD or YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.name: included_folders
fields.title: Included Folders
fields.description: Well-known folder names to include (e.g., 'inbox', 'sentitems', 'drafts'). Defaults to inbox and sent items.

fields.name: excluded_folders
fields.title: Excluded Folders
fields.description: Well-known folder names to exclude (e.g., 'junkemail', 'deleteditems'). Defaults to junk email and deleted items.

name: Pipedrive
description:
Pipedrive source connector integrates with the Pipedrive CRM API to extract CRM data.

Synchronizes customer relationship management data including persons, organizations,
deals, activities, products, leads, and notes.

Uses API token authentication.

fields.name: api_token
fields.title: API Token
fields.description: Your Pipedrive API token. Find it in Settings > Personal preferences > API.

name: PowerPoint
description:
Microsoft PowerPoint source connector integrates with the Microsoft Graph API.

Synchronizes PowerPoint presentations from Microsoft OneDrive and SharePoint.
Presentations are processed through Airweave's file handling pipeline which:
- Downloads the .pptx/.ppt/.pptm file
- Extracts text for indexing
- Chunks content for vector search
- Indexes for semantic search

It provides comprehensive access to PowerPoint presentations with proper token refresh
and rate limiting.

name: Salesforce
description:
Salesforce source connector integrates with the Salesforce REST API to extract CRM data.

Synchronizes comprehensive data from your Salesforce org including:
- Accounts (companies, organizations)
- Contacts (people, leads)
- Opportunities (deals, sales prospects)

It provides access to all major Salesforce objects with proper OAuth2 authentication.

name: ServiceNow
description:
ServiceNow source connector.

Syncs Incidents, Knowledge Base Articles, Change Requests, Problem Records,
and Service Catalog Items from a ServiceNow instance using the Table API
with Basic Auth (instance URL, username, password).

fields.name: url
fields.title: Instance URL
fields.description: Your ServiceNow instance URL (e.g. https://your-instance.service-now.com)

fields.name: subdomain
fields.title: Instance subdomain
fields.description: Instance subdomain (e.g. your-instance). Used to build URL if url is not set.

fields.name: username
fields.title: Username
fields.description: ServiceNow username for API access

fields.name: password
fields.title: Password
fields.description: ServiceNow password for API access

name: SharePoint
description:
SharePoint source connector integrates with the Microsoft Graph API.

Synchronizes data from SharePoint including sites, document libraries,
files, users, and groups.

It provides comprehensive access to SharePoint resources with intelligent
error handling and rate limiting.

name: Shopify
description:
Shopify source connector integrates with the Shopify Admin API.

Uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials grant to exchange client_id/client_secret
for an access token, then syncs comprehensive data from your Shopify store:
- Products and their variants with pricing and inventory
- Customer profiles and purchase history
- Orders with line items and fulfillment status
- Custom and Smart Collections
- Store locations and inventory levels
- Fulfillments and shipment tracking
- Gift cards and discounts/price rules
- Metaobjects for custom data structures
- Files/media via GraphQL
- Themes and templates

fields.name: client_id
fields.title: Client ID
fields.description: Client ID from your Shopify app in the Dev Dashboard

fields.name: client_secret
fields.title: Client Secret
fields.description: Client Secret from your Shopify app in the Dev Dashboard

fields.name: shop_domain
fields.title: Shop Domain
fields.description: Your Shopify store domain (e.g., 'my-store.myshopify.com')

name: Slab
description:
Slab source connector integrates with the Slab GraphQL API to extract knowledge base content.

Connects to your Slab workspace and synchronizes topics and posts.
Comments are included via search() results (CommentSearchResult) and synced.

fields.name: api_key
fields.title: API Token
fields.description: Your Slab API token. Generate one in Settings > Developer Tools > API Tokens.

fields.name: host
fields.title: Slab host
fields.description: Your Slab workspace host (e.g. 'myteam.slab.com'). Find it in your Slab URL when logged in. Required by the Slab API. Default: app.slab.com

name: Slite
description:
Slite source connector.

Syncs notes (documents) from your Slite workspace. Uses a personal API key
(Settings > API). List notes with optional parent filter, then fetches full
content per note (markdown) for embedding.

fields.name: api_key
fields.title: API Key
fields.description: Slite API key. Generate in your organization: Settings > API > Create a new key.

fields.name: include_archived
fields.title: Include archived notes
fields.description: If enabled, archived notes will be synced. Default: only active notes.

name: Slack
description:
Slack source connector using federated search.

Instead of syncing all messages and files, this source searches Slack at query time
using the search.all API endpoint. This is necessary because Slack's rate limits
are too restrictive for full synchronization.

fields.name: access_token
fields.title: Access Token
fields.description: The access token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.

name: Stripe
description:
Stripe source connector integrates with the Stripe API to extract payment and financial data.

Synchronizes comprehensive data from your Stripe account.

It provides access to all major Stripe resources
including transactions, customers, subscriptions, and account analytics.

fields.name: api_key
fields.title: API Key
fields.description: The API key for the Stripe account. Should start with 'sk_test_' for test mode or 'sk_live_' for live mode.

name: Teams
description:
Microsoft Teams source connector integrates with the Microsoft Graph API.

Synchronizes data from Microsoft Teams including teams, channels, chats, and messages.

It provides comprehensive access to Teams resources with proper token refresh
and rate limiting.

name: Todoist
description:
Todoist source connector integrates with the Todoist REST API to extract task data.

Connects to your Todoist workspace.

It provides comprehensive access to projects, tasks, and
collaboration features with proper hierarchical organization and productivity insights.

name: Trello
description:
Trello source connector integrates with the Trello API using OAuth1.

Connects to your Trello boards and syncs boards, lists, cards, checklists, and members.

Note: Trello uses OAuth1.0, not OAuth2.

fields.name: oauth_token
fields.title: OAuth Token
fields.description: The OAuth1 access token for Trello

fields.name: oauth_token_secret
fields.title: OAuth Token Secret
fields.description: The OAuth1 access token secret for Trello

name: Word
description:
Microsoft Word source connector integrates with the Microsoft Graph API.

Synchronizes Word documents from Microsoft OneDrive and SharePoint.
Documents are processed through Airweave's file handling pipeline which
downloads, converts to markdown, chunks, and indexes for semantic search.

name: Zendesk
description:
Zendesk source connector integrates with the Zendesk API to extract and synchronize data.

Connects to your Zendesk instance to sync tickets, comments, users, orgs, and attachments.

fields.name: subdomain
fields.title: Zendesk Subdomain
fields.description: Your Zendesk subdomain only (e.g., 'mycompany' NOT 'mycompany.zendesk.com')

fields.name: exclude_closed_tickets
fields.title: Exclude Closed Tickets
fields.description: Skip closed tickets during sync (recommended for faster syncing)

name: Zoom
description:
Zoom source connector integrates with the Zoom API.

Synchronizes data from Zoom including meetings, participants, recordings,
and transcripts. Provides comprehensive access to meeting context with
proper token refresh and rate limiting.

fields.name: access_token
fields.title: Access Token
fields.description: The access token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: The refresh token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.

name: Zoho CRM
description:
Zoho CRM source connector integrates with the Zoho CRM REST API to extract CRM data.

Synchronizes comprehensive data from your Zoho CRM org including:
- Accounts (companies, organizations)
- Contacts (people)
- Deals (sales opportunities, pipelines)
- Leads (pre-qualified prospects)
- Products (product catalog)
- Quotes (sales proposals)
- Sales Orders (confirmed orders)
- Invoices (billing documents)

It provides access to all major Zoho CRM modules with proper OAuth2 authentication.

fields.name: access_token
fields.title: Access Token
fields.description: The access token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: The refresh token for the OAuth2 app. This is obtained through the OAuth flow.
